info.description: Structured ZIP-level delivery day, cutoff, and rate table used by checkout, PDP/cart progress, and shipping pages.

Weekdays.description: Array of numeric weekdays, 0=Sunday ... 6=Saturday. Defaults from DeliveryDay when empty.

Rate1To29Cents.description: SAMADMIN 7-band: home-delivery charge (cents) when the PRODUCT (inventory items) subtotal is $1.00-$29.99. Compared against the product subtotal only (excludes shipping, tax, and non-inventory line items). When blank, the storefront falls back to Rate0To49Cents.

Rate30To49Cents.description: SAMADMIN 7-band: home-delivery charge (cents) when the PRODUCT subtotal is $30.00-$49.99. When blank, falls back to Rate0To49Cents.

Rate50To99BandCents.description: SAMADMIN 7-band: home-delivery charge (cents) when the PRODUCT subtotal is $50.00-$99.99. When blank, falls back to legacy Rate50To99Cents.

Rate100To149BandCents.description: SAMADMIN 7-band: home-delivery charge (cents) when the PRODUCT subtotal is $100.00-$149.99. When blank, falls back to legacy Rate100To149Cents.

Rate150To249BandCents.description: SAMADMIN 7-band: home-delivery charge (cents) when the PRODUCT subtotal is $150.00-$249.99. When blank, falls back to legacy Rate150To249Cents.

Rate250To349Cents.description: SAMADMIN 7-band: home-delivery charge (cents) when the PRODUCT subtotal is $250.00-$349.99. When blank, falls back to Rate250PlusCents.

Rate350PlusCents.description: SAMADMIN 7-band: home-delivery charge (cents) when the PRODUCT subtotal is $350.00 or more. When blank, falls back to Rate250PlusCents. Note: FreeDeliveryThresholdCents (default $250) still grants free delivery above its value regardless of band; set bands consistently with the free threshold.
